text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
You know, I really think they're going to cancel
the BNW concert...

text_block_list.name: Woman B
text_block_list.text:
What?! But we came all the way here just to see
them! We can't give up yet! Come on, let's just
wait a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head over to the mall on my day off to enjoy
some performances going on there, but when I
arrive, the crowd seems worked up in a bad way.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, trainer sighted! Nice timing!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I bet you're curious about what's going on too,
right? Let's scramble together and find out! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun pulls me into the center of the
chaos, where Biwa Hayahide is standing with a
worried expression on her face.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But if we cancel the concert, everyone who came
to watch us will be so disappointed.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I know I can't carry the show by myself, but
maybe I can buy some time until Taishin and
Ticket arrive, and—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh gosh, what's wrong, Hayahide? You look like
you're about to send out a distress call!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't expecting to see you two here. I'm sorry
you have to see me in such a state, but the truth
is...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Tickezo and Taishin won't make it?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
They said their train's stopped. Thankfully, I
decided to come early to make sure everything
was all right. But still...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This is supposed to be a BNW concert, and the
set list was decided with all three of us in mind.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's not possible to make it work on my own. Sigh... I can't believe we'll have to cancel everything after all that preparation.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Hayahide? How about if I act as your
wingman?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it'd be a huge shame to let so many
people down! Especially on a weekend!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I wanna do something for them, and they could
all use a present right now!
choice_data_list:
Would this be another of your "just-because"
presents?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The word "present" reminds me of when Mayano
Top Gun gave Oguri Cap a gift.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's a little "just-because" present! From me to
you!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You almost got it, but nope! This is gonna be a "slightly-special-because-it's-a wonderful-weekend" present!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
My dad gives out more than one kind of gift, you
know. He has presents for sunny days and secret
gifts for my mom, and all sorts of other presents
too!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I want to turn this disappointing day into a
spectacular gift for everyone!
choice_data_list: You're still short one person though.
You're still short one person though.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That's okay! If you join us, then we'll have just the
right number of people!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You're a Tracen trainer, aren't you? That means
you should be able to sing all our concert
songs! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not exactly jumping for joy at the prospect of
performing in front of everyone, but I have no
choice. I steel myself and step onto the stage.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Right now, Taishin and Ticket are doing their best
to make it here.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So until they get here, we'll be singing together,
everyone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
This is a special present for you all on this sparkly
and wonderful weekend!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Man, I came here to see BNW... But I guess this is
better than no concert at all.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
(Heehee! ♪ Time to execute a super cute turn in
time with the music!)

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Mayano Top Gun is so energetic—she's
adorable!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
(These next steps have gotta look light and airy!
Hehe! Looks like the audience is starting to get
their jets burning!)

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Dang, her moves are awesome! Look how cool she
is!

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text:
Did you see that? She just glanced this way! My
heart actually skipped a beat! How is she so sweet
and hypnotic at the same time?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(Mayano is incredible. Even in concerts, she's
such a free spirit. I can't lose out to her here!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We're treating you to a one-of-a-kind
arrangement today! So don't even think about
blinking!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: As a treat, I'll give you all a glimpse of both my cute side and my cool side! ♪

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
That Mayano Top Gun is really something else... I
should go watch her next race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Hey, everyone's having a blast.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! They're doing great! We can't let them
beat us though! C'mon, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You two made it! We've got a full squadron now! Okay, let's really get this party going! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
BNW's joint performance with Mayano Top Gun is
a smashing success and ends up becoming the top
trending topic on social media.
